CustomField.description: JSON object ({key:value}) of signer form-field values collected during e-signing. Validated server-side against the template's formFields config (required enforced, types coerced, unknown keys dropped) before write. Source for the finalize re-render ({?key} merge tags) and the decoupled record-writeback subsystem (DocGen_Field_Writeback__e). Guest write is gated by the one-shot Secure_Token__c capability, never by guest CRUD.
CustomField.label: Field Data Json
